name: nightshift
description: NightShift adapter for Codex CLI. Used by the NightShift orchestrator (Claude Code) to dispatch implementer tasks via `codex exec --json`.
note: Automations here are invoked from Claude Code by shelling out to `node <nightshift>/core/scripts/dispatch.mjs codex <task.json>`. The dispatch layer is the ONLY process that appends to events.ndjson; Codex skills must not append directly.
